overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in Western attire walking along a dirt path through grassy plains with rocky outcrops. A horse-drawn carriage passes by midway through, and the character eventually turns to encounter riders on horseback against a backdrop of snow-capped mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt road through grassy valley with rocky outcrops

events.description: horse-drawn covered wagon enters from right and passes by on the road
character turns left off the road and begins heading back toward the camera

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt road through tall grass between rocky formations

notable_agents.action: covered wagon drawn by white horses overtaking on the right side of the road

entered.detail: grass-covered rocky hillside with scattered trees forming the left valley wall
steep sedimentary rock face forming the right valley wall
unpaved trail with visible wheel ruts cutting through tall prairie grass
green prairie grass flanking both sides of the road
evergreen trees dotting the valley ahead along the road

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily along a dirt road through a wide grassy valley, flanked by rocky hillsides on both sides. A covered wagon drawn by white horses overtakes on the right, continuing down the trail ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy meadow with panoramic view of snow-capped mountains

events.description: riders on horseback appear on the road behind the character

agents.ego_description: turns left off the dirt road into the tall grass, then turns around to walk back toward the camera's direction

notable_agents.action: two riders on horseback following the dirt road behind the main character

entered.detail: distant mountain range with snow-covered peaks visible against the blue sky

segments.scene_description: The character turns off the road into the grass, then turns around to face the camera, revealing a stunning backdrop of snow-capped mountains. Two riders on horseback appear on the road behind, following the trail as the character walks back toward the camera.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a wide grassy valley that shifts from a journey along a dirt road to a dramatic confrontation against a mountain backdrop. It begins with the character walking steadily along a trail flanked by rocky hillsides, as a covered wagon drawn by white horses overtakes them from the right. As the character leaves the road and steps into the grass, they turn around to face the camera, causing the perspective to open up and reveal a stunning vista of snow-capped mountains. The scene then shifts focus to the road behind, where two riders on horseback appear and follow the trail as the character walks back toward the lens.
